conclusion.bundle_lift_rule_used: append zero charge on J6 to the CICY5259 ambient-restricted line-bundle matrix
conclusion.missing_seventh_divisor_route: ordinary ineffective split / configuration equivalence to favourable CICY 7914
conclusion.new_divisor_class: J6, the hyperplane class of the added P2 row in CICY 7914
conclusion.primary_remaining_blocker: No explicit free-action lift to the 7914 split coordinates, no action on the added divisor class, and no equivariant cohomology character decomposition are available in the current data.

external_data_or_algorithm_required_for_: A selected 5259 free Z2 action lifted through the 7914 P2 split, including coordinate and polynomial action.
The induced action on the full seven-dimensional Picard basis or an equivalent proof that the zero-extended line-bundle sum admits the required equivariant structure.
Equivariant cohomology character decompositions for H*(X,V), H*(X,V*) and the wedge2 sectors.
A Wilson-line character choice and projection check proving the downstairs standard-model spectrum.

full_picard_presentation_7914.full_kahler_cone_certificate_scope: favourable ambient positive orthant for the 7914 split presentation

pycicy_topology_probe.line_index_formula_scope: full favourable 7914 ambient divisor variables m0..m6
pycicy_topology_probe.line_slope_formula_scope: full favourable 7914 ambient Kahler variables t0..t6

explicit_ineffective_split_found.note: CICY 7914 contracts to CICY 5259 by merging columns 0,1,2 under the added P2 row

full_favourable_slope_gate.evidence: src/string_theory/slope.py on the CICY 7914 full favourable cone
full_favourable_slope_gate.note: numerical slope-zero point found with all seven Kahler parameters positive

full_pycicy_cohomology_spectrum_gate.evidence: pyCICY cohomology on CICY 7914 zero-extended line bundles
full_pycicy_cohomology_spectrum_gate.note: upstairs spectrum matches the 5259 scout and passes regular nontrivial summand checks

full_upstairs_topology_gates.evidence: CICY 7914 full favourable intersection tensor and C2
full_upstairs_topology_gates.note: zero-extended bundle has c1=0, index=-6, wedge2 index=-6, and effective anomaly in seven components

pycicy_full_topology_cross_check.note: full favourable c2 and triple-intersection data cross-check

quotient_descent_still_blocked.evidence: data/raw/cicylist.m Num -> 7914 plus cohomology character boundary
quotient_descent_still_blocked.note: the split presentation has no recorded free action/equivariant character data, so Wilson-line descent is not certified

split_is_favourable_full_picard_basis.note: the redundant split presentation supplies seven ambient divisors for h11=7

ineffective_split_audit.interpretation: The selected hit is the ordinary P2 split of the first CICY5259 column. Deleting the added P2 row and merging the three split columns exactly reconstructs the 5259 configuration.

blocked_items.item: explicit lift of a selected 5259 free Z2 action to the 7914 split coordinates and split equations
blocked_items.why_needed: the split added a P2 row and three replacement equations for one original equation

blocked_items.item: 7x7 action on the full Picard basis including J6
blocked_items.why_needed: ambient-row triviality on the six 5259 rows does not determine the missing divisor direction

blocked_items.item: equivariant line-bundle lift/fiber characters for the zero-extended summands
blocked_items.why_needed: topological invariance is not the same as a chosen equivariant bundle structure

blocked_items.item: cohomology character decomposition for V and wedge2 V
blocked_items.why_needed: Wilson-line projection needs actual representations, not just dimensions and indices

quotient_descent_boundary.conditional_statement: If one constructs a split-compatible free action and equivariant lift whose cohomology characters satisfy the order-two Wilson-line projection, this 7914 lift supplies the missing full Picard topology.

algebraic_geometric_derivation.evidence: the P2 split gives J6; deriving the free action on J6 and cohomology characters remains separate

configuration_equivalence.evidence: CICY5259 Redun includes 7914, and both have eta=-48 and Hodge numbers (7,31)

ineffective_splitting.evidence: CICY 7914 one-step P2 split contracts exactly to CICY 5259

known_quotient_literature_or_data.evidence: Oxford quotient data records 5259 free Z2 actions; the favourable split presentation has unknown symmetry status in cicylist.m and no local split-action character data.

picard_group_computation.evidence: the favourable 7914 presentation has NumPs=h11=7 and supplies a full ambient Picard basis

tooling_boundary.interpretation: No external Picard/Chow computation system was available on PATH; the successful upstairs route used the explicit favourable split in cicylist.m instead.

line_bundle_sum_quality.interpretation: trivial summands/global sections are mathematically checkable but may imply enhanced structure group or gauge-sector caveats relative to regular SU(5) line-bundle scan assumptions
